=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 4.0.0

/.src/catchToIgnore.ts(9,3): suggestion TS377099: `Effect.ignore` expresses ignored failure more directly than `Effect.catch` returning `Effect.void`. effect(catchToIgnore)
/.src/catchToIgnore.ts(14,3): suggestion TS377099: `Effect.ignoreCause` expresses ignored failure more directly than `Effect.catchCause` returning `Effect.void`. effect(catchToIgnore)
/.src/catchToIgnore.ts(20,3): suggestion TS377099: `Effect.ignore` expresses ignored failure more directly than `Effect.catch` returning `Effect.void`. effect(catchToIgnore)
/.src/catchToIgnore.ts(25,3): suggestion TS377099: `Effect.ignore` expresses ignored failure more directly than `Effect.catch` returning `Effect.void`. effect(catchToIgnore)
/.src/catchToIgnore.ts(31,39): suggestion TS377099: `Effect.ignore` expresses ignored failure more directly than `Effect.catch` returning `Effect.void`. effect(catchToIgnore)


==== /.src/catchToIgnore.ts (5 errors) ====
    import { Effect, pipe } from "effect"
    
    declare const voidEffect: Effect.Effect<void, string, never>
    declare const undefinedEffect: Effect.Effect<undefined, string, never>
    declare const numberEffect: Effect.Effect<number, string, never>
    
    // Should trigger: catch returning Effect.void on a void success channel
    export const shouldTriggerCatch = voidEffect.pipe(
      Effect.catch(() => Effect.void)
      ~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! suggestion TS377099: `Effect.ignore` expresses ignored failure more directly than `Effect.catch` returning `Effect.void`. effect(catchToIgnore)
    )
    
    // Should trigger: catchCause returning Effect.void on a void success channel
    export const shouldTriggerCatchCause = voidEffect.pipe(
      Effect.catchCause((_cause) => Effect.void)
      ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! suggestion TS377099: `Effect.ignoreCause` expresses ignored failure more directly than `Effect.catchCause` returning `Effect.void`. effect(catchToIgnore)
    )
    
    // Should trigger: pipe style
    export const shouldTriggerPipe = pipe(
      Effect.fail("error"),
      Effect.catch(() => Effect.void)
      ~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! suggestion TS377099: `Effect.ignore` expresses ignored failure more directly than `Effect.catch` returning `Effect.void`. effect(catchToIgnore)
    )
    
    // Should trigger: block body
    export const shouldTriggerBlock = undefinedEffect.pipe(
      Effect.catch(() => {
      ~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! suggestion TS377099: `Effect.ignore` expresses ignored failure more directly than `Effect.catch` returning `Effect.void`. effect(catchToIgnore)
        return Effect.void
      })
    )
    
    // Should trigger: data-first style
    export const shouldTriggerDataFirst = Effect.catch(voidEffect, () => Effect.void)
                                          ~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! suggestion TS377099: `Effect.ignore` expresses ignored failure more directly than `Effect.catch` returning `Effect.void`. effect(catchToIgnore)
    
    // Should NOT trigger: Effect.ignore would discard the number success value
    export const shouldNotTriggerValueSuccess = numberEffect.pipe(
      Effect.catch(() => Effect.void)
    )
    
    // Should NOT trigger: fallback is not exactly Effect.void
    export const shouldNotTriggerOtherFallback = voidEffect.pipe(
      Effect.catch(() => Effect.sync(() => undefined))
    )
